home.metaDescription: Le Palladia Toulouse: 4-star luxury hotel, 90 rooms and suites, spa, swimming pool, restaurant, lounge bar, meeting rooms and function rooms.
home.introText: Le Palladia, an independent 4-star hotel in Toulouse, offers 90 spacious rooms and suites, an auditorium seating 285, 16 daylit meeting rooms, a cosy lounge bar, a traditional restaurant, an outdoor swimming pool and a dedicated wellness area.
home.trouverText: Set between Toulouse-Blagnac international airport and the city centre, this luxury hotel combines striking modern architecture with a resolutely contemporary charm.
home.sejourText: The Hôtel Palladia is the ideal setting for a business trip or a romantic escape in Occitanie.
home.chambresText: Every room is carefully composed around a distinctive aesthetic, creating an atmosphere at once sophisticated and welcoming. Our four categories of room offer a range of options to suit every preference and requirement.
home.restaurantText: The flavours on our menu change with the seasons, for a refined culinary experience. Our chef cooks with fresh, carefully chosen ingredients.
home.spaText: Step into this haven of escape. Our spa welcomes not only guests of the Hôtel Palladia, but anyone seeking an exclusive moment of relaxation.
home.sallesText: The Hôtel Palladia stands apart with its auditorium seating 285 — unique in Toulouse. For your meetings, 16 rooms bathed in natural light.
home.mariagesText: Our team places its function rooms at your disposal for the finest day of your life. The rooms may be hired over two days, so the celebrations can carry on with a brunch the following morning.
home.spectaclesText: The contemporary character of the Hôtel Palladia shows in its vibrant celebration of cultural diversity, expressed through a programme as eclectic as it is captivating.
home.videoText: Discover our hotel on film: reception hall, rooms, outdoor swimming pool, auditorium, meeting rooms, bar and restaurant.
home.coffretsText: Treat someone — or treat yourself. Choose from our range of gift boxes.
home.bandeauSpectacles: Le Palladia also puts on shows all year round
